2606.08094.title: vla.cpp: A Unified Inference Runtime for Vision-Language-Action Models
2606.08094.paper_summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) policies are typically shipped as Python/PyTorch stacks that assume a workstation-class GPU, a mismatch for the hardware on which robots actually run. We present vla.cpp, a portable C++ inference runtime built on llama.cpp. To our knowledge, it is the first ggml-class engine to natively serve the flow-matching and diffusion VLA inference pattern, in which a cached vision-language prefix is consumed by a cross-attending action expert integrated over several solver steps. A single runtime serves seven architectures spanning five backbone and four action-head families behind one request/response protocol, with each model packaged as a self-contained bundle. On LIBERO-Object, the engine matches a state-of-the-art checkpoint to within one episode out of 200, and runs BitVLA at 100% success in 1.3 GiB of memory. The same bundle runs unchanged across three hardware tiers, from a consumer GPU down to an 8 GB embedded module. A cross-hardware roofline analysis shows that batch-1 VLA inference is compute-bound, so utilization rather than bandwidth is the deployment lever; an IMMA ladder GEMM derived from this analysis cuts BitVLA per-step latency by 4.5x. We then frame an on-robot stress test on an ALOHA arm that isolates the latency constraint under which a learned VLA must replan against a moving target on the hardware it was trained for. Code, demo videos, and the reproducible benchmark scaffold are available at https://fai-modelopt-tech.github.io/vla-cpp.github.io/.
2606.08094.paper_summary_zh: 視覺-語言-行動 (VLA) 策略通常作為 Python/PyTorch 堆疊發佈，假設使用工作站級別的 GPU，這與機器人實際運行的硬體不符。我們提出了 vla.cpp，一個基於 llama.cpp 的可攜式 C++ 推理運行時。據我們所知，它是第一個 ggml 類引擎，能夠原生支持流匹配和擴散 VLA 推理模式，其中一個緩存的視覺-語言前綴被跨注意的行動專家在幾個求解步驟中整合使用。單一運行時支持七種架構，涵蓋五個主幹和四個行動頭系列，並且在一個請求/響應協議下運行，每個模型被打包為一個獨立的捆綁包。在 LIBERO-Object 上，該引擎在 200 次回合中匹配了一個最先進的檢查點，並在 1.3 GiB 的內存中以 100% 的成功率運行 BitVLA。相同的捆綁包在三個硬體層級上運行不變，從消費者 GPU 到 8 GB 嵌入式模組。跨硬體的 roofline 分析顯示，批次 1 的 VLA 推理是計算受限的，因此利用率而非帶寬是部署的槓桿；基於此分析的 IMMA 梯形 GEMM 將 BitVLA 每步延遲減少了 4.5 倍。然後，我們在 ALOHA 手臂上框定了一個機器人壓力測試，該測試隔離了學習的 VLA 必須在其訓練的硬體上對移動目標重新規劃的延遲約束。代碼、演示視頻和可重現的基準架構可在 https://fai-modelopt-tech.github.io/vla-cpp.github.io/ 獲得。
2606.08094.author: Khanh D. Nguyen et.al.
2606.08094.authors: Khanh D. Nguyen, Hung T. Ho, Chinh T. Nguyen, Thanh Q. Duong, Linh D. Le, Duy M. H. Nguyen, Vien A. Ngo, An T. Le
